creator: ports@caomhin.org
text:
Created attachment 169104
Add CONFLICTS_INSTALL to www/py-django-happenings (Maintainer Update)

With the update to py27-django-mptt-0.8.3 there is now an install conflict:

===>  Installing for py27-django-mptt-0.8.3
===>  Checking if py27-django-mptt already installed
===>   Registering installation for py27-django-mptt-0.8.3
Installing py27-django-mptt-0.8.3...
pkg-static: py27-django-mptt-0.8.3 conflicts with py27-django-happenings-0.3.3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/tests/__init__.py
*** Error code 70

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/py-django-mptt

I suspect neither port should really be using such a generic location but they do so the quick solution is CONFLICTS.
